steps.title: Emphasize the shared nutrient
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize a similarity between kale and carrots. The notes say both vegetables contain ascorbic acid, which is also known as vitamin C.

steps.title: Reject one-sided details
steps.content: A discusses only carrots. B focuses on humans needing vitamin C and mentions kale but not carrots. D compares vegetables with fruits in general instead of comparing kale with carrots. The sentence naming both vegetables and vitamin C states the shared trait. The answer is C.
